message:
fix(circuit_breaker): bit-packing overlap and store-vs-CAS race (bd-2wds9)

Two bugs found during combinator audit:

1. HalfOpen::to_bits() bit-field overlap: probes_active (bits 8-39) could
   corrupt successes (bits 32-63) when probes_active > 2^24. Fixed by
   masking probes_active to 24 bits in encoding, matching from_bits decode.

2. record_success() window-triggered Open transition used plain store()
   which could clobber concurrent state transitions. Replaced with CAS
   loop consistent with all other state transition sites.

Includes 2 regression tests for the bit-packing fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
